Text.Page:
An undead general named {@LinkCreature:32#19$$Chimakur} is terrorizing {@Rgn:32006$$Frigid Vigil}.

They call him the high executioner, which is apt because he's killed three experienced federation soldiers already.

What do you say? Are you up to the challenge? I sure hope so. It won't be long before the executioner comes for all our heads.
I wasn't wrong about you. Here's a little something for saving our bacon.
